headline: Aptiv Announces Cash Tender Offer for 3.250% Senior Notes Due 2032, 5.150% Senior Notes Due 2034, 5.750% Senior Notes Due 2054, 5.400% Senior Notes Due 2049, 4.400% Senior Notes Due 2046, 4.150% Senior Notes Due 2052 and 3.100% Senior Notes Due 2051
